meta.title: Marine Corps Boot Camp Pugil Sticks
meta.description:
Pugil sticks will be one of many battles recruits face at Marine Corps boot camp. Pugil sticks teach recruits close-quarters combat tactics and techniques and help boost confidence in one's self. Are you considering joining the United States Marine Corps? Learn more about the battles that lie ahead here:

https://bit.ly/3jG9SvN

(U.S. Marine Corps video by Cpl. Brooke C. Woods)
The appearance of U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.
